textByHash.2ad36c6ada4aac8662da1a7d03442822566de2c4: No, not yet. He may still prove useful to us.
textByHash.39c760eb4caec1d3f4a6273bdcd8883172509d7a: Forget about the human and the statue for now. Our experiments are more important.
textByHash.2f5aae908f0597e1737346f661910cd1048c560f: This time they'll survive, I hope.
textByHash.7ee60345f335c87aad1e986e81e8f2f2f803cd2b: Yes, things would have been so much easier with the statue.
textByHash.c6afb9d82403e9fad15d1faeea11f595ce85f34f: And we would have gotten away with it too, if it wasn't for that pesky human.
textByHash.4601d20ca3b1cddea390c94235dc515458008116: Return to Arposandra and tell your superiors we've had a partial success.
textByHash.cb8c676bccc9398dc9f93708c7d707bdced179d8: I am conducting a meeting here, begone!
textByHash.cd016cb79da680423b83e46312ff65d7233a7d2f: Enough of this, everyone! This bickering is pointless.
textByHash.6734b9080fba548c29b197a031c7aff51459a931: The Red Axe is the largest and wealthiest mining company, we have all rights here!
textByHash.3a5df54a5197b6e061f3b5d8fded1a01ea8a1463: No! I will go on top of that statue! I proposed this in the first place!
textByHash.13e0d4df183f0f6a176d2f65033374e4667d4ee9: A human, at a Consortium meeting? What is this?
textByHash.ce5886d12620781acf6702e88a35e195de71b015: This is outrageous! I'm warning you, The Red Axe will boycott the Trade Octagon!
textByHash.152c27962f3ed7dc6f298f5e0b8b70ff6fe6bd51: You'll regret this, all of you!
